---
title: "Negative Binomial Regression — Summary: `r params$target_drug`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: false
    theme: flatly
params:
  result_files: !r character(0)
  target_drug:  "Semaglutide"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
source("helper_functions.R")
```

```{r build-table}
rows <- lapply(params$result_files, function(f) {
  load(f)   # restores nb_result
  r <- nb_result

  coefs <- summary(r$m1)$coefficients
  rr    <- exp(coefs["treatment", "Estimate"])
  rr_lo <- exp(coefs["treatment", "Estimate"] - 1.96 * coefs["treatment", "Std. Error"])
  rr_hi <- exp(coefs["treatment", "Estimate"] + 1.96 * coefs["treatment", "Std. Error"])
  pval  <- coefs["treatment", "Pr(>|z|)"]

  n_target     <- sum(r$dataset$treatment == 1L)
  n_comparator <- sum(r$dataset$treatment == 0L)

  data.frame(
    Target              = r$target_drug,
    Comparator          = r$comparator_group,
    N_Target            = n_target,
    N_Comparator        = n_comparator,
    Dependent_Variable  = r$dep_var,
    Period              = r$period_name,
    Covariates          = paste(r$covariates, collapse = ", "),
    Rate_Ratio          = rr,
    CI_95               = paste0("(", round(rr_lo, 3), ", ", round(rr_hi, 3), ")"),
    P_Value             = pval,
    stringsAsFactors    = FALSE
  )
})

summary_tab <- do.call(rbind, rows)
```

```{r render-table}
summary_tab %>%
  mutate(
    N_Target     = comma(N_Target),
    N_Comparator = comma(N_Comparator),
    Rate_Ratio   = round(Rate_Ratio, 3),
    Sig          = sig_code(P_Value),
    P_Value      = ifelse(P_Value < 0.001, "<0.001", round(P_Value, 3))
  ) %>%
  rename(
    `Target`             = Target,
    `Comparator`         = Comparator,
    `N (Target)`         = N_Target,
    `N (Comparator)`     = N_Comparator,
    `Dependent Variable` = Dependent_Variable,
    `Period`             = Period,
    `Covariates`         = Covariates,
    `Rate Ratio`         = Rate_Ratio,
    `95% CI`             = CI_95,
    `P-Value`            = P_Value,
    ` `                  = Sig
  ) %>%
  knitr::kable(escape = FALSE, align = c("l","l","r","r","l","l","l","r","r","r","l")) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
                            full_width = TRUE, font_size = 14) %>%
  kableExtra::footnote(general       = "Signif. codes: 0 '&#42;&#42;&#42;' 0.001 '&#42;&#42;' 0.01 '&#42;' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1",
                       general_title = "",
                       escape        = FALSE)
```
